listing.name: Claude Sentient
listing.tagline: Autonomous development orchestration for Claude Code
listing.description:
Claude Sentient transforms Claude Code sessions into autonomous development loops. It coordinates Claude Code's native capabilities — TaskCreate, EnterPlanMode, Agent sub-agents, MCP servers — into a cohesive workflow with quality gates, language profiles, and session management.

Not a replacement for Claude Code — a thin orchestration layer that makes built-in tools work together autonomously.

features.name: Autonomous Development Loop
features.description: INIT → PLAN → EXECUTE → VERIFY → COMMIT cycle with quality gates

features.name: Language Profiles
features.description: 9 language-specific profiles with lint, test, and build commands

features.name: Agent Teams
features.description: Spawn specialized agents (security, frontend, backend, database, etc.) for parallel work

features.name: Codebase Health Audit
features.description: 6-dimension assessment: architecture, quality, security, performance, debt, tests

features.name: Session Browser
features.description: Browse, search, and resume previous Claude Code sessions

features.name: Multi-Model Orchestration
features.description: Configure which Claude model handles which task types

features.name: MCP Server Management
features.description: Check, register, and validate MCP server connections

features.name: PR Review
features.description: Automated pull request review with structured analysis
